false_positive_rate.note: User-reported false positives divided by total dangerous verdicts in the quarter. Reports verified manually by the analyst team before counting.

intel_sources_active: Cleanway modern-phish guard — BitB + tab-napping + overlay (#11)

data_requests_received.note: URL scanning is server-blind: full URLs and per-page browsing history are never stored — only domain-level signals derived at query time. Account billing data (email, Stripe customer id, subscription tier), family-group membership, and the audit_log for account/security actions ARE stored to operate the service; that data is in scope for a future government request. None received this period.
